frequency.1hrCM: monthly-mean diurnal cycle resolving each day into 1-hour means
frequency.1hrPt: sampled hourly, at specified time point within an hour
frequency.3hrPt: sampled 3 hourly, at specified time point within the time period
frequency.6hrPt: sampled 6 hourly, at specified time point within the time period
frequency.monC: monthly climatology computed from monthly mean samples
frequency.monPt: sampled monthly, at specified time point within the time period
frequency.subhrPt: sampled sub-hourly, at specified time point within an hour
frequency.yrPt: sampled yearly, at specified time point within the time period

grid-label.gn: data reported on a model's native grid
grid-label.gna: data reported on a native grid in the region of Antarctica
grid-label.gng: data reported on a native grid in the region of Greenland
grid-label.gnz: zonal mean data reported on a model's native latitude grid
grid-label.gr: regridded data reported on the data provider's preferred target grid
grid-label.gr1: regridded data reported on a grid other than the native grid and other than the preferred target grid
grid-label.gr1a: regridded data reported in the region of Antarctica on a grid other than the native grid and other than the preferred target grid
grid-label.gr1g: regridded data reported in the region of Greenland on a grid other than the native grid and other than the preferred target grid
grid-label.gr1z: regridded zonal mean data reported on a grid other than the native latitude grid and other than the preferred latitude target grid
